options: function id<T>(x: T): T { return x }
function id(x: any): any { return x }
function id<T>(x: T): any { return x }
questions.explanation: T flows in and out — the caller gets back its own type.

questions.code:
function first<T>(arr: T[]): T | undefined { return arr[0]; }
const x = first([1, 2, 3]);
questions.explanation: T is inferred as number; return keeps the '| undefined'.
